chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4847 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ قَالَ قَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "إِذَا قَالَتِ اَلْمَرْأَةُ زَوْجِي عَلَيَّ كَظَهْرِ أُمِّي فَلاَ كَفَّارَةَ عَلَيْهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.4847 - In the narration of Al-Sakuni, it is reported that Commander of the Faithful (as) said: "If a woman says, 'My husband is to me as the back of my mother,' there is no expiation upon her."
